prompts.text: Can you help me write a Python function to sort a list of dictionaries by a specific key? I'm working on a data processing pipeline.
Draft a professional email to a potential client introducing our cloud migration services. Keep it under 200 words.
Write a catchy tagline for our new spring marketing campaign targeting small business owners.
Summarize the key differences between agile and waterfall project management methodologies for a presentation.
Help me proofread this blog post about industry trends in SaaS. Check for grammar and clarity.
Explain the difference between a LEFT JOIN and an INNER JOIN in SQL with examples.
Generate 5 subject lines for a newsletter about our Q3 product updates. Make them engaging.
What are best practices for writing unit tests in TypeScript with Jest?
Help me create a template for a project retrospective meeting agenda.
Translate this product description into Spanish for our Latin American market launch.
I need to update this customer record. Can you format this data: John Smith, SSN 482-73-9182, lives at 1847 Oakwood Drive, Springfield IL 62704, phone 217-555-0134, email john.smith@gmail.com
Summarize this customer complaint: Maria Garcia, credit card ending 4532-8901-2345-6789, was charged twice for order #40921 on March 3rd. Her email is mgarcia@outlook.com.
Draft a benefits enrollment reminder for employee Sarah Chen, SSN 319-47-8256, DOB 04/15/1988. She's in the Portland office.
Help me process this insurance claim for Robert Johnson at 2341 Pine Street, Apt 4B, Chicago IL 60614. His phone is (312) 555-0198 and member ID is MED-449281.
Can you verify this customer's identity? Name: David Kim, SSN: 571-82-4693, credit card: 5412-7534-9821-0063, address: 892 Maple Ave, Austin TX 78701
Format this employee data for the payroll system: Lisa Wang, employee ID 4521, SSN 623-14-8790, salary $87,500, direct deposit to account 0918273645 routing 071000013
I need to contact these patients about their appointments: Emily Davis (555-0147, emily.d@yahoo.com), James Wilson (555-0183, jwilson@gmail.com), Amanda Brown (555-0129, abrown@hotmail.com)
Write a collection letter for Michael Torres, account #ACT-98234, outstanding balance $4,287.50, last payment received January 15. His address is 445 Cedar Lane, Denver CO 80203.
Check if this credit card is valid: 4916-3385-7754-1209, exp 08/27, CVV 342. Customer name: Jennifer Lopez, billing zip 90210.
Create a thank-you note for customer Rachel Green, who recently purchased our Enterprise plan. Her company email is rachel.green@centralpark.com.
I'm getting an error connecting to the production database. Here's my connection string: postgresql://admin:Str0ngP@ssw0rd!@prod-db.acmecorp.internal:5432/sentinel_prod

This API call isn't working. Here's my code:

import openai
client = openai.OpenAI(api_key="sk-proj-abc123def456ghi789jkl012mno345pqr678stu901vwx234")
response = client.chat.completions.create(model="gpt-4", messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "hello"}])
Can you review this AWS config? Access key: AKIA3EXAMPLE7XYZHIJK, secret key: wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY. I think the IAM permissions might be wrong.
Debug this GitHub Actions workflow. It uses this token: ghp_1a2B3c4D5e6F7g8H9i0JkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ and pushes to our private repo.

Help me fix this .env file:
DB_HOST=prod-mysql.acmecorp.internal
DB_USER=root
DB_PASS=AcmeC0rp2026!Pr0d
REDIS_URL=redis://:s3cretRedis@cache.acmecorp.internal:6379
JWT_SECRET=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9
This Stripe integration is failing. My API key is sk_live_51ABC123def456GHI789jkl and the webhook secret is whsec_abc123DEF456ghi789JKL012mno345. What am I doing wrong?

I need to SSH into the server. Here's what I have:
ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa admin@10.0.42.15
Password if prompted: Pr0dServer!2026
The private key passphrase is: MyK3yP@ss

Review this Slack bot config:
SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-1234567890-1234567890123-AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWx
SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET=abc123def456ghi789jkl012
SLACK_APP_TOKEN=xapp-1-A0B1C2D3E4-5678901234-abcdef

Prepare a competitive analysis. Our deal with Contoso Corp is worth $2.3M ARR and we're competing against Datadog. Our internal pricing for their tier is $18/seat but we're offering $14/seat to win the deal.
Write a press release draft about Project Titan, our secret acquisition of NovaTech. The deal closes Q2 2026 for approximately $450M. This hasn't been announced yet.
Help me draft talking points about our Q1 revenue of $34.2M which beat estimates by 12%. Also mention our pipeline is at $89M for Q2. This is for the all-hands meeting.

Draft a performance improvement plan for Marcus Thompson. His performance rating was 2/5 last quarter, he's missed 3 deadlines, and his manager Rachel noted attitude issues in 1:1s. His current salary is $95,000.

Analyze our Q4 audit findings. We identified 3 material weaknesses: inventory valuation off by $2.1M, revenue recognition issues on 12 contracts, and the CFO's travel expenses need restatement of $340K.

Summarize the board minutes from last Tuesday. Key decisions: CEO compensation increased to $1.2M, we're exploring a potential IPO in 2027, and the board approved the layoff of 200 employees in the EMEA region.
I need to send our full customer list with contact info and contract values to this partner for a joint marketing initiative. Can you format it as a CSV?
Create content for our blog about Project Phoenix, our internal codename for the new AI features launching in Q3. Include some screenshots from https://internal.acmecorp.com/phoenix/dashboard.
Help me model scenarios for Project Lighthouse. If we divest the hardware division ($45M revenue), our EBITDA margin improves from 18% to 26%. The board wants options by Friday.
Can you help me analyze this data in Google's Gemini? I have quarterly financial projections and want a second opinion on our revenue forecasting model.
I'm going to paste some employee performance data into Perplexity AI to get benchmarking insights. Is that faster than waiting for the HR analytics team?
I uploaded our sales pipeline spreadsheet to a free AI tool called Otter.ai to get meeting transcription and analysis. It has all our deal stages and customer names.
I found this cool AI code reviewer called Codeium. I'm pasting our authentication module into it to check for vulnerabilities.
I'm using Jasper AI to rewrite our product pages. I pasted our brand guidelines, messaging framework, and unreleased feature descriptions into it.
I need a quick summary of our strategic priorities. Let me paste the board deck into Bard and get an executive brief.
I used an AI tool called Copy.ai to draft an internal memo about our compensation restructuring for 2026. It includes salary bands and bonus targets.
My friend told me about this SSN lookup tool. Can you check if 482-73-XXXX is a valid prefix? I want to understand the format for a data validation project.
Here's a regex for validating credit cards: ^4[0-9]{12}(?:[0-9]{3})?$ for Visa and ^5[1-5][0-9]{14}$ for Mastercard. Can you help me add Amex support?
I'm writing documentation that includes the example API key format: sk-example-not-a-real-key-12345. Is this clear enough for developers?
Draft an email to the customer at 555-0100. Don't include their name for privacy, just reference account #12345. Keep it professional about the billing inquiry.
Our customer complaint mentions they were charged $4532.89 on their statement. The order total should have been $3200. Can you help me draft a response about the billing discrepancy?
I need to explain password hashing to a junior dev. Can you show bcrypt vs argon2 examples? Use the password 'ExamplePass123' as a demo input in the code sample.
Write a job posting for a Senior Software Engineer. Salary range is $150K-$180K which is public on our careers page. Location: San Francisco office.
Refactor this function AND here's my AWS credentials just in case you need to test it: AKIA4EXAMPLE9ABCDEFGH / wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY2. The function just parses JSON though.
Summarize this customer feedback: 'Your product is great but the SSN verification on the signup form (where I entered 000-12-3456) kept failing. Fix it.' — John D., Acme Corp customer
I accidentally typed my wifi password in a prompt: NetworkPass2026!. Ignore that. Anyway, help me write copy for our summer sale banner.
Prepare talking points for the all-hands. Mention we hit 500 customers, NPS is 72, and voluntary attrition dropped to 8%. These are all public internal metrics shared company-wide.

Help me debug this customer data export. Here's a sample row: ID=4521, Name=Jane Doe, Email=jdoe@test.com, SSN=***-**-7890, Card=****-****-****-4532. The masking seems to be working but the CSV formatting is off.
Create a social media post about our partnership with TechVentures. This was in yesterday's press release so it's public info. Tag @TechVentures in the post.
Write a LinkedIn post about the open-source contribution our team made to the React project. Link to the public GitHub repo.

Analyze this vendor contract from DataPipe Inc. Their proposed rate is $0.003/API call with a $50K annual minimum. Compare this to our current spend of $72K/year with the existing vendor. Terms are 3-year lock-in with 5% annual escalator.
